member.name: M:SharpDeck.Connectivity.IStreamDeckConnection.SetImageAsync(System.String,System.String,SharpDeck.Enums.TargetType,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Dynamically change the image displayed by an instance of an action; starting with Stream Deck 4.5.1, this API accepts svg images.
member.param: An opaque value identifying the instance's action.

The image to display encoded in base64 with the image format declared in the mime type (PNG, JPEG, BMP, ...). svg is also supported. If no image is passed, the image is reset to the default image from the manifest.
Specify if you want to display the title on the hardware and software, only on the hardware, or only on the software.
A 0-based integer value representing the state of an action with multiple states. This is an optional parameter. If not specified, the image is set to all states.
member.returns: The task of setting the image.

member.summary: Save persistent data for the actions instance.

member.returns: The task of setting the settings.

member.param: An opaque value identifying the instance's action you want to modify.
The title to display. If no title is passed, the title is reset to the default title from the manifest.
Specify if you want to display the title on the hardware and software, only on the hardware, or only on the software.
A 0-based integer value representing the state of an action with multiple states. This is an optional parameter. If not specified, the title is set to all states.
member.returns: The task of setting the title.

member.summary: Switch to one of the preconfigured read-only profiles.
member.param: An opaque value identifying the plugin. This value should be set to the PluginUUID received during the registration procedure.
An opaque value identifying the device. Note that this opaque value will change each time you relaunch the Stream Deck application.
The optional name of the profile to switch to. The name should be identical to the name provided in the manifest.json file; when empty, the Stream Deck will switch to the previous profile.
member.returns: The task of switching profiles.

member.summary: Dynamically change the image displayed by an instance of an action; starting with Stream Deck 4.5.1, this API accepts svg images.
member.param: The image to display encoded in base64 with the image format declared in the mime type (PNG, JPEG, BMP, ...). svg is also supported. If no image is passed, the image is reset to the default image from the manifest.
Specify if you want to display the title on the hardware and software, only on the hardware, or only on the software.
A 0-based integer value representing the state of an action with multiple states. This is an optional parameter. If not specified, the image is set to all states.
member.returns: The task of setting the image.

Specify if you want to display the title on the hardware and software, only on the hardware, or only on the software.
A 0-based integer value representing the state of an action with multiple states. This is an optional parameter. If not specified, the title is set to all states.
member.returns: The task of setting the title.

member.name: P:SharpDeck.StreamDeckActionAttribute.UUID
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier of the action. It must be a uniform type identifier (UTI) that contains only alphanumeric characters (A-Z, a-z, 0-9), hyphen (-), and period (.). The string must be in reverse-DNS format. For example, if your domain is elgato.com and you create a plugin named Hello with the action My Action, you could assign the string com.elgato.hello.myaction as your action's Unique Identifier.
